resources.string: Pages, appearance, labels, imports, defaults, summaries, and data.
Keep at least one functional page visible.
Import events and customize the timeline view.
Manage label colors and cleanup actions.
Pre-fill new items with your preferred values.
Morning brief and evening wrap-up notifications.
Protect access to the app and sensitive screens.
Configure the home screen widget picker.
Export, restore, and clean up local data.
Small quality-of-life settings and app info.
Preview the available widgets before using them on your home screen.
Completed tasks, tasks due, and upcoming events.
A glance at upcoming calendar items.
The next scheduled events and reminders.
